title: Cyanococcus margarettae

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, including its small, blue berries and deciduous shrub habit. The genus Cyanococcus is a group of blueberry plants that are native to North America. The Ericaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as the heath family.
